channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BINI to perform at Coachella's Mojave Stage this 2026
item.description: BINI, one of the most exciting acts in the Filipino pop scene, is set to perform at Coachella, one of the biggest music festivals in the world. The Filipino girl group will be featured on the Mojave s...

item.title: DOE Assures Enough Fuel Supply for the Next 50 Days Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: The Philippines' fuel supply is secure for the next 50.42 days, or until the latter half of May, despite the ongoing global oil supply disruptions caused by tensions in the Middle East, according to t...

item.title: Glasgow taxi driver jailed for sexual assault of passenger
item.description: A Glasgow taxi driver, Thomas Tosh, 39, has been sentenced to seven years in prison for raping and sexually assaulting a vulnerable passenger. The attack occurred after Tosh picked up a 23-year-old wo...

item.title: Bollywood film ‘Dhurandhar’ becomes a focal point in Indian political discourse
item.description: The Bollywood film ‘Dhurandhar’, starring Ranveer Singh and directed by Aditya Dhar, has transcended cinema to influence political debates across India. Since its initial release in December 2025, fol...

item.title: Scott Mills Temporarily Steps Back from MS Society UK Role Following BBC Dismissal
item.description: Scott Mills, the former Radio 2 DJ, has decided to step back from his role as an ambassador for MS Society UK following his recent dismissal from the BBC. Mills has been a committed advocate for multi...

item.title: Three young men charged after orchestrating disturbance at Whitby cinema for social media video
item.description: Durham Regional Police have charged three males in connection with a staged incident at a Whitby movie theatre that was allegedly organized to generate social media content. According to investigators...

item.title: Deborah Mbara Opens Up About Blessing CEO Allegedly Altering Her Cancer Report
item.description: Deborah Mbara, a cancer survivor and the Creative Director of Zazi Beauty, has shared her story about the controversial incident involving relationship expert, Blessing Okoro, also known as Blessing C...

item.title: Three Women Die in Busia Road Crash After Attending Burial, Leaving Family in Grief
item.description: A tragic accident in Busia County has left a family in mourning after three women, identified as Carolyne Wewa, Lilian Adiedo, and Margaret Kadenge, lost their lives in a road crash. The women were re...

item.title: Tetracore Energy Opens New CNG Station in Uwusan, Benin to Support Gas Mobility
item.description: Tetracore Energy Group don open new Auto Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) station for Uwusan, Benin City, Edo State. The station fit fuel up to 200 commercial vehicles daily, including buses, trucks, and ...

item.title: CBCP urges dioceses to hold prayer vigils for global peace
item.description: The Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines (CBCP) has called on church leaders across the country to organize diocesan prayer vigils on April 11, 2026, as part of a worldwide initiative led b...

item.title: Indian Airlines Cut Over 10,000 International Flights Due to Iran-US Tensions, Government Confirms
item.description: According to reports from India's Aviation Ministry, the ongoing war between Iran and the United States has severely impacted international flight operations by Indian carriers. More than 10,000 fligh...

item.title: UN Resolution to Reopen Strait of Hormuz Blocked by China and Russia
item.description: Russia and China have thrown a wrench into efforts to ease tensions in the region by vetoing a United Nations Security Council resolution aimed at reopening the Strait of Hormuz. The Strait, a vital w...

item.title: KMD Predicts a Week of Cold Nights and Ongoing Rains in Several Kenyan Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has announced that the country should expect cold nights and continuous rainfall across many areas during the week of April 7 to 13, 2026. According to the we...

item.title: Warriors player Adam Pompey faces scrutiny over controversial move
item.description: Warriors centre Adam Pompey has found himself in hot water following a controversial move during an attacking play against Briton Nikora. The incident, which occurred in the NRL match, has raised conc...

item.title: China and Russia block UN resolution aimed at maritime security in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On Tuesday, the UN Security Council witnessed China and Russia veto a Bahraini-led resolution intended to promote coordinated efforts for protecting commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Out of...

item.title: How Retirees Can Access Home Equity Through the Government Scheme
item.description: Many older Australians have significant wealth tied up in their homes but limited income during retirement. The federal government’s Home Equity Access Scheme (HEAS), formerly known as the Pension Loa...

item.title: Trump issues stern warning to Iran ahead of Strait of Hormuz deadline
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran as a self-imposed deadline approached for the country to open the Strait of Hormuz. In a post on Truth Social, Trump stated that 'a whole civ...

item.title: Middle East conflict disrupts South African exports and drives up supply chain costs
item.description: South Africa’s economic recovery is under renewed pressure as the ongoing war in the Middle East impacts global trade routes and diminishes demand for exports. Despite a slight improvement in the S&P ...

item.title: Trump Administration Faces Multiple Domestic and International Challenges
item.description: The article examines the various challenges confronting the Trump administration, highlighting recent legal, economic, and international setbacks. While the successful rescue of an American airman sho...

item.title: Laro Laro Pick's Heartfelt Moments of Malasakit on 'It's Showtime'
item.description: On the popular Philippine variety show, 'It's Showtime,' several Laro Laro Pick moments have moved viewers with their heartfelt display of malasakit, or compassion. These moments, which feature celebr...
